tasks.description: B4 / FGAP-043 — cross-block join tool (HYBRID edge + field). Library joinBlocks(cwd, spec): JoinResult[] in project-sdk.ts where spec={leftBlock,rightBlock,relationType?|leftField?+rightField?,leftEndpoint?,leftPredicate?} and JoinResult={left:ItemRecord, right:ItemRecord[]} (right always array; one-to-many natural). tasks.description: Implement FGAP-090 — wire pi's eager guidance hooks into the pi-context extension so the in-pi LLM receives framework guidance. Block = a topic->TOOL-CALL map (the constrained agent has no read tool, so route to tools not file paths): vocabulary/relation_types/block_kinds -> read-config / read-samples-catalog (authoritative, never invent canonical names); schema -> read-schema; live tools+signatures -> list-tools; add a block kind -> read-samples-catalog then write-schema + amend-config; bootstrap -> /context start; + grounding directives (queryable, don't confabulate, FGAP-092). ~12-18 lines, STATIC (no substrate I/O, works pre-bootstrap). SECONDARY: a resources_discover handler returning { skillPaths: [abs packages/pi-context/skills/pi-context] } so skills surface as <available_skills> metadata (dist/core/skills.js:258-277), mirroring examples/extensions/dynamic-resources.

tasks.description: Fix the pi-context skill-name collision (startup [Skill conflicts] warning via launch-constrained-pi.sh). Cause: scripts/generate-skills.js generateMetaSkill copies every sub-package skill into the meta-package (packages/pi-project-workflows/skills/<name>), and FGAP-090's resources_discover now self-surfaces packages/pi-context/skills/pi-context — so pi-context's skill reaches pi's name-keyed loader from two paths -> collision (byte-identical copies, cosmetic but a self-inflicted regression). Second root: generate-skills never cleans the meta skills dir (mkdir+writeFile only), so orphans persist. FIX (both roots): (1) rmSync the meta skills dir at the start of generateMetaSkill before regenerating (idempotent clean-rebuild; import rmSync); (2) skip pi-context in the copy loop (`if (result.shortName==="pi-context") continue;`) since it self-surfaces via resources_discover; keep copying pi-workflows + pi-behavior-monitors (no resources_discover hook). Then npm run skills removes packages/pi-project-workflows/skills/pi-context/.
